name: Azumanga Daioh - The RPG
description:
𝗔𝘇𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴𝗮❟ 𝗗𝗮𝗶𝗼𝗵!

ʟᴜ, ʟᴀ ʟᴜ!

Be ready to have exciting adventures in the... Azuma High School? Lets just call it that. You've recently transferred (of course) High schools, because your parents moved into a quaint, yet quiet neighborhood, since city life was way too chaotic for them. You'll miss your old friends, sure, but this is an opportunity to make even more friends! I hope.

𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿 𝗻𝗼𝘁𝗲𝘀

This bot. This bot, right here, is what I consider to be my best. My magnum opus, and I guess a 30 followers special? I haven't even hit 30 followers yet, I don't know why I'm celebrating this early... This bot is a BIG WIP, I will be regularly be updating it and adding more content to it. And no, there is no Chiyo Mihama in this due to the site's TOS. Anyway, please don't forget to leave feedback, it really helps!
creator: Dokawaki
